name: Chinese Pasta Salad with Creamy Ginger Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 Each Dash Sesame oil for noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the marinade ingredients (white pepper) in a small bowl and add shrimp. Blanch the noodles, rinse under cool water, and sprinkle with sesame seed oil. Toss and set aside.
2. Trim noodles with scissors to about 4 inches in length for easier serving.
3. Blanch whole snow peas and set aside.
4. Heat wok, add 1 tablespoon oil, when hot, add shrimp and stir-fry until pink. Set aside.
5. DRESSING: In a blender or food processor, mix ginger, garlic, egg yolk, egg white, and lemon juice. Slowly drizzle in oil (vegetable, not olive). Mix in soy sauce and cream. Set aside.
6. Toss noodles, shrimp, and snow peas. Mix in dressing to taste.
7. Garnish with scallions and coriander.
8. Serve at room temperature.
